# Assertion in LValue::addUnsizedArray (!isPointerType && !isArrayType) during constexpr eval of dereference on redeclared array with negative size

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173601
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T22:50:36Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/sM56oreaK

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

### Comment 2 - shafik

This looks like a dup, the issue goes back further but I think this is just hitting a different path that does not always reach the problematic code. If the fix for the dup does not fix this we can reopen.

---
